original: This single-tailed bio whip is designed mainly from braided leather, but its tip is actually organic, based off the biology of a skorian’s tail and coated in a translucent aphrodisiac. When a subject is struck by the whip, the potent drug is directly delivered, causing both pleasure and pain to surge through their skin. There is a disclaimer label stating prolonged whipping may cause an individual to confuse pain with pleasure.
